template.name: Vehicle
Controller

query.comment: Safety: no two vehicles occupy the same critical zone at the same time.
Continuous-flow rule: no vehicle has zero speed.
Reservation validity: every vehicle inside a critical zone has a valid reservation.
Liveness: normal vehicle 0 can eventually cross the intersection.
Liveness: emergency vehicle 1 can eventually cross the intersection.
Liveness: normal vehicle 2 can eventually cross the intersection.
Emergency priority: the emergency-priority flag can eventually become true.
System liveness: all vehicles can eventually leave the intersection.
Even after dynamic rescheduling, vehicles continue moving and are not stopped.
